headline: Is Aflac Incorporated (AFL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is AFL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Aflac Incorporated on Trevor Young’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on AFL. Aflac Incorporated’s share was trading at $114.67 as of April 20th. AFL’s trailing and forward P/E were 16.81 and 14.53 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Aflac, Inc. (AFL) stands out […]
